title: ConsumeRequest
description: Options for consuming messages from a topic.

after_message_id.description: Retrieve messages published after this message ID. Cannot be used together with since_time.

since_time.description: Retrieve messages published after this RFC 3339 timestamp. Cannot be used together with after_message_id.

batch_size.description: Maximum number of messages to return. Must be between 1 and 50.

timeout_secs.description: Long-polling timeout in seconds. If no messages are available, the server waits up to this many seconds before returning an empty response. Maximum is 60 seconds. Default is 0 (no long polling).
